evals.prompt: 帮我把 openapi.yaml 转成 JMeter 脚本，50 并发跑 5 轮。
evals.expected_output: 调用 generator.generate_from_openapi 解析文档，生成包含 50 线程、5 循环的 JMX 文件。

assertions.text: Parses the OpenAPI document to extract endpoints
Generates JMX with num_threads=50 and loops=5
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs grep -q 'num_threads="50"' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Output JMX file contains ThreadGroup with correct concurrency settings
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs grep -q 'ThreadGroup' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Each endpoint has an HTTPSamplerProxy with correct method and path
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs grep -q 'HTTPSamplerProxy' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt:
把这个 curl 命令转成 JMeter 脚本：
curl -X POST 'https://api.example.com/api/users' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer token123' -d '{"name": "John"}'
evals.expected_output: AI 解析 curl 为 endpoints.json 格式，然后调用 generate_jmx.py 生成 JMX。

assertions.text: Parses curl command to extract method, URL, headers, and body

assertions.script: find . -name 'endpoints.json' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs test -f && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Calls generate_jmx.py or generator API to produce JMX
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: JMX includes Authorization header and JSON request body
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs grep -q 'Authorization' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 这份 Markdown 格式的 API 文档帮我转成压测脚本。
evals.expected_output: 使用 generate_from_markdown 解析 Markdown API 文档，生成 JMX 文件。

assertions.text: Uses Markdown parser to extract API endpoints
Handles common Markdown API doc formats (接口地址/请求方式 or GET /path)
Generates valid JMX XML that can be opened in JMeter 5.0+
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs python3 -c "import sys,xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; ET.parse(sys.argv[1]); print('PASS')" 2>/dev/null || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Includes response assertions for each endpoint
assertions.script: find . -name '*.jmx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs grep -q 'ResponseAssertion' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reports the output file path and number of endpoints processed
